title: Santa Cap
description: A little Texture Pack which transforms the Carved Pumpkin to a little christmas hat
body:
### Santa Cap Texture Pack
Bring the holiday spirit to Minecraft with the Santa Cap Texture Pack! Transform the carved pumpkin into festive Santa hats and removes the pumpkin overlay, perfect for celebrating Christmas in your blocky world. Whether you're building a winter wonderland, decorating a Christmas tree, or spreading cheer with friends, this pack will keep you looking jolly. Ho ho ho, and happy crafting!
